title: tritoma media
intro: Tritoma media, also known as Globe Mallow or Desert Mallow, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tritoma media include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its potential to aid in wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
